summary.one_liner: Role Foundry is a role-training, evaluation, and promotion system for AI apprentices; this branch makes the generation provenance chain explicit by showing that each evaluated generation carries receipts, evaluation context, score deltas, and a promotion/public-issuance decision, while the current evidence proves a Software Engineer apprentice public alpha loop, a local private-holdout honesty boundary, a staged ERC-8004/Base issuance path, and an external Clawith -> OpenClaw -> Claude/vibecosystem roundtrip path without claiming live minting, native parity, or sealed certification.
summary.scope_note: The shipped public curriculum remains frontend/product-heavy even though the role framing is broader software engineering.

generation_provenance.note: Each evaluated generation is framed through receipts, evaluation context, score deltas, and a promotion/public-issuance decision.

erc8004_base_adapter.note: Promoted/public generations can be staged for ERC-8004 issuance through a thin Role Foundry-owned adapter; no live mint is claimed.

external_roundtrip.note: Tracked proof index plus portable export bundle show one external Clawith -> OpenClaw -> Claude/vibecosystem roundtrip path without upgrading the claim to native parity.

allowed: Generation provenance framing: receipts, evaluation context, score deltas, promotion/public-issuance decision
Software Engineer apprentice as the first concrete shipped role
Staged ERC-8004/Base issuance path for promoted/public generations
External Clawith -> OpenClaw -> Claude/vibecosystem roundtrip proof indexed by the tracked manifest and portable bundle
not_claimed: Live Base mint on Sepolia or mainnet

remaining_optional_work.label: Live Base mint receipt
remaining_optional_work.needed_for: Any claim that a Role Foundry generation was actually minted as an ERC-8004 identity on Base

remaining_blockers: Fill the submission portal with the canonical packet paths and final branch/commit.
Complete required team self-custody and team-admin publish steps.
Keep ERC-8004 / Base wording staged_not_minted unless this branch also gains a real wallet-approved onchain receipt.
